# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"',
            description: 'Custom build command to execute'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: 'echo "No test script specified"',
            description: 'Custom test script/command to execute'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: 'echo "No deploy command specified"',
            description: 'Custom deployment command to execute'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['dev', 'staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target deployment environment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the test stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the deploy stage'
        )
    }

    environment {
        ALLOWED_COMMANDS_PATTERN = '^[a-zA-Z0-9_./ \\-]+$'
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def dangerousPatterns = [
                        /.*[;|&`\$\(\)].*/,
                        /.*\bsudo\b.*/,
                        /.*\brm\s+-rf\b.*/,
                        /.*\bchmod\b.*/,
                        /.*\bchown\b.*/,
                        /.*\bcurl\b.*\|\s*\bbash\b.*/,
                        /.*\bwget\b.*\|\s*\bbash\b.*/,
                        /.*\beval\b.*/,
                        /.*\bexec\b.*/,
                        /.*>\s*\/etc\/.*/,
                        /.*\bdd\b\s+if=.*/,
                        /.*\bmkfs\b.*/,
                        /.*\b\/dev\/\b.*/,
                        /.*\bnc\b\s+-[elp].*/,
                        /.*\bnetcat\b.*/,
                        /.*\bpython\b.*-c.*/,
                        /.*\bperl\b.*-e.*/,
                        /.*\bruby\b.*-e.*/,
                        /.*\bbase64\b.*\bdecode\b.*/,
                        /.*\benv\b\s+\/.*/,
                        /.*\bexport\b.*=.*/,
                        /.*\bsource\b\s+\/.*/,
                        /.*\b\.\s+\/.*/,
                        /.*\\x[0-9a-fA-F]{2}.*/,
                        /.*\$\{.*\}.*/,
                        /.*`.*`.*/,
                        /.*\$\(.*/,
                        /.*>\s*\/dev\/tcp\/.*/,
                        /.*\/proc\/.*/,
                        /.*\/sys\/.*/
                    ]

                    def allowedBuildPrefixes = [
                        'make', 'gradle', 'mvn', 'npm', 'yarn', 'dotnet',
                        'go build', 'cargo build', 'cmake', 'ant',
                        'docker build', 'echo', 'cat', 'ls', 'pwd',
                        'pip install', 'bundle install', 'composer install'
                    ]

                    def allowedTestPrefixes = [
                        'make test', 'gradle test', 'mvn test', 'npm test',
                        'npm run test', 'yarn test', 'dotnet test', 'go test',
                        'cargo test', 'pytest', 'jest', 'mocha', 'rspec',
                        'phpunit', 'echo', 'cat', 'ls'
                    ]

                    def allowedDeployPrefixes = [
                        'kubectl', 'helm', 'docker push', 'docker-compose',
                        'aws', 'gcloud', 'az', 'terraform', 'ansible',
                        'scp', 'rsync', 'echo', 'cat', 'ls',
                        'npm publish', 'mvn deploy', 'gradle publish'
                    ]

                    def validateCommand = { String cmd, String paramName, List allowedPrefixes ->
                        if (cmd == null || cmd.trim().isEmpty()) {
                            error("${paramName} cannot be empty")
                        }

                        def trimmedCmd = cmd.trim()

                        for (pattern in dangerousPatterns) {
                            if (trimmedCmd =~ pattern) {
                                error("SECURITY VIOLATION: ${paramName} contains a disallowed pattern. Command rejected: '${trimmedCmd}'. Dangerous pattern detected.")
                            }
                        }

                        def hasAllowedPrefix = allowedPrefixes.any { prefix ->
                            trimmedCmd.startsWith(prefix)
                        }

                        if (!hasAllowedPrefix) {
                            error("SECURITY VIOLATION: ${paramName} must start with one of the allowed commands: ${allowedPrefixes.join(', ')}. Got: '${trimmedCmd}'")
                        }

                        echo "Validated ${paramName}: '${trimmedCmd}' - OK"
                    }

                    validateCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, 'BUILD_COMMAND', allowedBuildPrefixes)

                    if (!params.SKIP_TESTS) {
                        validateCommand(params.TEST_SCRIPT, 'TEST_SCRIPT', allowedTestPrefixes)
                    }

                    if (!params.SKIP_DEPLOY) {
                        validateCommand(params.DEPLOY_COMMAND, 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', allowedDeployPrefixes)
                    }

                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT == 'production') {
                        def approvers = ['admin', 'release-manager', 'devops-lead']
                        def currentUser = currentBuild.getBuildCauses('hudson.model.Cause$UserIdCause')
                        def userId = currentUser ? currentUser[0]?.userId : 'unknown'
                        echo "Production deployment requested by user: ${userId}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== BUILD STAGE =========="
                    echo "Executing build command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Target environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"

                    def sanitizedBuildCmd = params.BUILD_COMMAND.trim()
                        .replaceAll('[;|&`\$(){}\\\\]', '')

                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        ${sanitizedBuildCmd}
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== TEST STAGE =========="
                    echo "Executing test script: ${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"

                    def sanitizedTestCmd = params.TEST_SCRIPT.trim()
                        .replaceAll('[;|&`\$(){}\\\\]', '')

                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        ${sanitizedTestCmd}
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Approval') {
            when {
                expression {
                    return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY && params.ENVIRONMENT == 'production'
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Production deployment requires manual approval"
                    timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        input(
                            message: "Approve deployment to PRODUCTION?",
                            ok: 'Deploy',
                            submitter: 'admin,release-manager,devops-lead',
                            submitterParameter: 'approver'
                        )
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== DEPLOY STAGE =========="
                    echo "Executing deploy command: ${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Deploying to: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"

                    def sanitizedDeployCmd = params.DEPLOY_COMMAND.trim()
                        .replaceAll('[;|&`\$(){}\\\\]', '')

                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        ${sanitizedDeployCmd}
                    """
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo "========== PIPELINE SUMMARY =========="
                echo "Build Command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                echo "Test Script: ${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                echo "Deploy Command: ${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
                echo "Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
                echo "Tests Skipped: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                echo "Deploy Skipped: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOY}"
                echo "Build Result: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"

                def auditLog = [
                    timestamp: new Date().toString(),
                    buildNumber: env.BUILD_NUMBER,
                    jobName: env.JOB_NAME,
                    buildCommand: params.BUILD_COMMAND,
                    testScript: params.TEST_SCRIPT,
                    deployCommand: params.DEPLOY_COMMAND,
                    environment: params.ENVIRONMENT,
                    result: currentBuild.currentResult,
                    buildUrl: env.BUILD_URL
                ]
                echo "AUDIT LOG: ${auditLog}"
            }
        }
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline completed successfully!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline failed! Check the logs for details.'
        }
        aborted {
            echo 'Pipeline was aborted.'
        }
    }
}
